description_long: This object is an irregularly shaped stone with a pronounced curvature, resembling a bent or hooked fragment. The surface is rugged and uneven, with visible textural variations and subtle color mottling in shades of dark gray, brown, and hints of green. One end of the stone is bulbous and thicker, while the opposite end tapers off, giving it an asymmetrical, organic appearance. The stone's surface shows signs of natural weathering, with pitted areas and rough edges, suggesting prolonged exposure to the elements. There are no visible carvings or artificial modifications, and the coloration appears naturally mottled rather than patterned. This type of stone could serve as a natural obstacle or decorative element in an urban park or along a landscaped pathway.
description: A rugged, curved stone with a bulbous end and a tapered, rough surface, featuring mottled dark gray and brown coloration. Its irregular shape and weathered texture suggest natural origin and prolonged exposure.
description_view_0: The stone appears thick and blocky from this angle, with the bulbous end most prominent and surface roughness clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the pronounced curvature and elongated form, with the bulbous end on the left and the tapered end extending right.
description_view_2: From this angle, the stone looks narrow and upright, emphasizing its vertical dimension and the uneven, jagged surface.
description_view_3: The curvature is most evident here, with the stone arching from the bulbous end to the thinner tip, and surface mottling visible along the length.
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or natural obstacle on the ground
attribute_pattern: Subtle natural mottling with no regular or artificial patterns; coloration is irregular and organic.
attribute_weathering: Rough and pitted with visible signs of natural weathering, indicating prolonged exposure to outdoor elements.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Blends naturally with soil, gravel, or other stones, and may be partially surrounded by grass or low vegetation.
